title: POV: You Took Every Setup and Still Lost Money in 2026
description: The more setups you take, the more money you lose. Here's the brutal truth about over-trading and how the R2F Trading system filters only the setups that actually pay. Stop trading noise. Start trading smart money. #ICTTrading #OrderBlocks #FairValueGap #SmartMoneyConcepts #FundedTrader
script: You took 11 setups this week. You lost money on 9 of them. More setups is NOT more money. POV: It's Monday. London open. You see price sweep Friday's high — and you jump in long. Rookie mistake. That sweep? Smart money just ran your stop. They needed your liquidity to sell INTO you. Here's what changes everything — after the sweep, price drops into an untouched order block. THAT is the real entry. One trade. Right setup. Right time. That one trade beat all 11 of yours combined. The R2F Trading system teaches you to wait for the sweep, confirm the structure shift, THEN enter the fair value gap. Patient traders get paid. Follow R2F Trading. We post setups like this every day. Link in bio — free ICT checklist at r2ftrading.com.
